strengths: 18+ years of diverse software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems exceeds tenure requirements
Demonstrated full-stack builder capability with hands-on coding, architecture, and current work on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP frameworks)
Proven entrepreneurial track record founding and maintaining GISCollective since 2016, showing ability to identify and execute technical opportunities
concerns: No Master's/PhD in AI or demonstrated deep ML/AI expertise; AI work appears recent (April 2025) with no established products or recognized thought leadership
Currently titled Staff/Senior Engineer, not at director or principal level; no evidence of strategic leadership, executive presence, or advising customers/partners at scale
Limited cloud platform strategy background; AWS CDK mention is operational, not strategic architecture or platform vision work required for the role
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack engineer with impressive breadth and 18+ years of experience. However, this Principal Engineer role specifically requires director-level strategic leadership in AI/ML with recognized expertise and products. His AI involvement is very recent (April 2025) without demonstrated depth, he lacks advanced AI/ML credentials, and his career trajectory shows technical IC growth rather than strategic director-level positioning. While he could grow into this level, he does not currently possess the specialized AI strategy background or executive presence required.
